name: New Year's Day
description: First day of the Gregorian calendar year, celebrated nationwide.

name: Chinese New Year
description: Lunar New Year celebrated by Chinese-Filipino communities.

name: Maundy Thursday
description: Christian observance on the Thursday before Easter, part of Holy Week.

name: Good Friday
description: Christian observance commemorating the crucifixion of Jesus Christ.

name: Black Saturday
description: Day of silence between Good Friday and Easter Sunday in Holy Week.

name: Araw ng Kagitingan
description: Day of Valor commemorating Filipino and American defenders of Bataan in WWII.

name: Independence Day
description: Marks the Philippines’ declaration of independence from Spain in 1898.

name: Ninoy Aquino Day
description: Commemorates the assassination of Benigno 'Ninoy' Aquino Jr.

name: National Heroes Day
description: Honors Filipino heroes; observed on the last Monday of August.

name: All Saints' Day
description: Day to remember all saints; observed nationwide.

name: All Souls' Day
description: Day of remembrance for the faithful departed.

name: Bonifacio Day
description: Celebrates Andres Bonifacio, a national revolutionary hero.

name: Feast of the Immaculate Conception of Mary
description: Catholic feast honoring the Immaculate Conception.

name: Christmas Eve
description: Day before Christmas celebrated with family gatherings.

name: Christmas Day
description: Christian celebration of the birth of Jesus Christ.

name: Rizal Day
description: Honors national hero Dr. Jose Rizal.

name: Last Day of the Year
description: New Year’s Eve observed as a special non-working day.
